description: Bryan Johnson discusses the importance of sleep and introduces five key habits to improve sleep quality, emphasizing the need for a professional approach to sleep and routines to enhance restfulness.
topic_summary: In this keynote, Bryan Johnson outlines five essential habits for better sleep, including becoming a professional sleeper, establishing a wind down routine, maintaining consistency, managing lighting, and timing the last meal before bed. He shares personal insights from his experience achieving a perfect sleep score over eight months [t=34.57].
